title: WebView2 CDP screenshot path (--remote-debugging-port wiring)
goal: Wire WebView2 to expose Chrome DevTools Protocol via `WEBVIEW2_ADDITIONAL_BROWSER_ARGUMENTS=--remote-debugging-port=<random>` and `WEBVIEW2_USER_DATA_FOLDER` per spec §6.4.1 (AC-VISUAL-DEBUGGER-IMPL). Implement the headless screenshot API `kernel.visual_debug.screenshot(scope, opts)` (PNG via CDP Page.captureScreenshot) per §6.4.3.
expected_diff_shape: app/src-tauri/src/main.rs or equivalent bootstrap: set the env vars before WebView2 init; new module src/backend/handshake_core/src/operator_foreground/cdp_client.rs providing a typed CDP client; Tauri command handler in app/src-tauri/src/visual_debug.rs exposing the screenshot IPC.
unblock_conditions: MT-014 quiet window foundation; MT-007 ProcessOwnershipLedger so the CDP-driven WebView2 child process is recorded with engine_kind appropriate.
implementation_notes: Per spec §6.4.1: WebView2 CDP requires setting two env vars before WebView2 process spawn. In app/src-tauri/src/main.rs (find the existing entry point via Glob app/src-tauri/src/*.rs), before `tauri::Builder::default().build()`, set `std::env::set_var("WEBVIEW2_ADDITIONAL_BROWSER_ARGUMENTS", format!("--remote-debugging-port={}", random_port))` where random_port is chosen via TcpListener::bind("127.0.0.1:0"). Set `std::env::set_var("WEBVIEW2_USER_DATA_FOLDER", per_test_dir)` where per_test_dir is a fresh tempdir each launch. Expose the chosen port via a new IPC channel `kernel.visual_debug.port() -> u16` so test harnesses can find it. cdp_client.rs: thin async CDP client using tokio + websocket (use `tokio-tungstenite` crate; add to Cargo.toml) — implements just enough CDP to call `Page.captureScreenshot { format: "png", clip: Option<{x,y,width,height}> }` and `Runtime.evaluate` (for the console-error scan in MT-022). Tauri command `kernel.visual_debug.screenshot(scope: ScreenshotScope, opts: ScreenshotOpts) -> Vec<u8>` where ScreenshotScope = { Full, Element { selector: String }, Region { x, y, w, h } }. The CDP-spawned WebView2 child registers in ProcessOwnershipLedger with `engine_kind = "webview2_cdp"`. Tests: spawn the app in test mode, connect via CDP, call captureScreenshot, assert PNG bytes are valid (PNG magic header check). Per AC-VISUAL-DEBUGGER-IMPL the WebView2 instance is never modified outside test scope — confirm by asserting no UI state changes after the screenshot call.
risk_if_missed: Without CDP wiring the visual debugger has no capture path; HBR-VIS-001 cannot be satisfied via Playwright.
validator_focus: Random port + per-test user-data-folder are confirmed by reading env vars after init; the CDP-spawned child appears in ProcessOwnershipLedger; no UI state changes from a screenshot call.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Random port selection via TcpListener::bind(0) (no fixed port; prevents collision in parallel test runs).
Per-launch WEBVIEW2_USER_DATA_FOLDER is a tempdir cleaned on Handle drop.
ProcessOwnershipLedger row exists for the CDP-spawned WebView2 child.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: VisualDebugState::initialize allocates a random localhost port via TcpListener::bind(0), creates a per-port WEBVIEW2_USER_DATA_FOLDER under temp_dir, sets WEBVIEW2_ADDITIONAL_BROWSER_ARGUMENTS=--remote-debugging-port=<port> and WEBVIEW2_USER_DATA_FOLDER before Tauri Builder runs; cdp_client.rs provides a typed CDP client with Page.captureScreenshot; ProcessEngineKind::Webview2Cdp is registered.

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: WebView2 CDP wiring absent: no WEBVIEW2_ADDITIONAL_BROWSER_ARGUMENTS env var, no random remote-debugging-port, no visual_debug.rs, no cdp_client.rs, no Tauri command kernel.visual_debug.screenshot.
